title: Crispy Fermented Russian Sweet Rice Flour Dumplings
description: A traditional Russian dish featuring crispy fermented dumplings made with sweet rice flour, perfect for a snack or dessert. This recipe is Whole30-friendly and uses papillote for added flavor.
instructions: Combine sweet rice flour, water, salt, sugar, and yeast in a large bowl to make the dough.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a warm place to ferment for 2 hours.
Heat coconut oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Divide the fermented dough into 12 equal pieces and shape into balls.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and wrap in papillote paper.
Fry the dumplings in batches until crispy and golden brown.
Drain excess oil on paper towels.
